name: elementary-light-ui
readme:
# elementary Light UI theme

elementary-styled Atom UI, based on the default light UI theme for Atom.

This theme can be activated by going to
the _Themes_ section in the Settings view (`cmd-,`) and selecting it from the
_UI Themes_ drop-down menu.

![](https://f.cloud.github.com/assets/671378/2265022/bb148a20-9e7a-11e3-81c8-bf5965d48183.png)
